newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Structural setup unchanged: China equipment-localization leader with 2026 revenue guided ~46.8-52.0B RMB on domestic fab buildout; remains on the US Entity List (Dec 2024) creating both a localization moat and a US-component supply risk. No new orders or guidance in the window.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO/foundry-capex lens: NAURA is an indirect wafer-equipment proxy whose China-localization scarcity remains intact, and at only 57% YTD it is the least re-rated of this batch's China names. No fresh evidence since June 9; the June 8 hold still fits, so hold.
verdicts.bull: China equipment-localization moat; strong 2026 guide; Entity List forces domestic adoption.
verdicts.neutral: Indirect CPO/capex exposure; thesis steady, no new catalyst.
verdicts.bear: $80B cap; policy/export-control and valuation-discovery risk on US-origin components.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: China fab capex / domestic-tool share gains
